e2e.testCommand: COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME=arcanist-preview-$ARCANIST_APP_HOST_PORT docker compose -f docker-compose.arcanist.yml exec -T web bash scripts/arcanist-runtime-smoke.sh
e2e.seedCommand: COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME=arcanist-preview-$ARCANIST_APP_HOST_PORT docker compose -f docker-compose.arcanist.yml exec -T web bash scripts/arcanist-runtime-seed.sh
e2e.resetCommand: COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME=arcanist-preview-$ARCANIST_APP_HOST_PORT docker compose -f docker-compose.arcanist.yml exec -T web bash scripts/arcanist-runtime-seed.sh
